OKI just got back from watching the movie and hells maybe about 5 or 6 of us and a theater that is seat 65 maybe it was just too cold because where I lived we got the white stuff here but I don't know about the movie itself..... That's a different type of movie I've never seen anything like it and I've been watching horror movies for almost 60 plus years and it's different I like that actually the ending I'm not so sure about I'm still pondering if I wipe the end Internet but the rest of the movie was really good how do I describe it sort of like hell's kitchen on steroids it was definitely something that you've never seen before probably we'll never see again most spoilers I don't like giving spoilers So I'm gonna say you need to check it out yourself The restaurant itself was beautiful I'd like to know where that actually is I'd like to eat there if I could afford it but definitely couldn't have eaten in there they were talking 12000 a plate and it was definitely I couldn't afford that....... Otherwise like I said I thought it was pretty good the person I went to see the movie was but it was really good I didn't really have a chance to talk with any of the other people there to see what their opinion was but I think you should check it out I want all I'm gonna give it a 13 out of 13 skulls and say it's definitely worth checking out It was original I'll give you that I was something I had never seen before I was very original I definitely enjoyed it I would even go to see it again even though I know what's gonna happen I would enjoy it again That's about it for this week keep checking in with my reviews you'll see that I review movies probably almost every day if not every week so when a new one appears I'm there if it looks like something worth watching

When I saw this movie, the beginning made me think this was going to be great. When they started showing all the terrible things the guests were doing, I thought oh this is going to be about a chef who kills people who do terrible things, kind of like jigsaw but a chef instead. Then they got to the chase scene & I thought oh here we go. What a letdown, the chase scene is useless. in fact, it could have been cut out and the movie and the movie would have stayed the same. No story, the acting isn't that great & the ending was terrible. Flush this TURD right away.

@user-ed9bq3kg4t I watched in theater

@armandozertuche4054 Spoiler:


During her search in the chef's house she found his old pictures when he used to cook burgers "when he was happy", he also said it multiple times she is one of the "service industry" and she has the chance to leave .. when she asked for the burger to go .. he was more than happy to let her go. She sort of knew how to read him, she tried to save everyone and it was fruitless .. eventually when she was heading out of the door she hesitated but the rich old lady gave her a hand gesture to go as everyone in the restaurant will die. As I said the movie has a lot of Cult mentally to it .
I feel for people in the food industry that will be subjected to Chefs inspired by Ralph Fines portrayal.
